description: Execute V0.7-M4 by defining the environment discovery, capability modeling, and drift analysis methods for multi-AI Coding environments.
scope: Generate a comprehensive design document (tasks/v0.7-m4-environment-adaptation.md) that defines how the system uses environment fingerprints (e.g. process.env.OPENCODE_SESSION) to identify tools, maps their capabilities (e.g., native MCP support), tracks adapter drift, and proposes non-intrusive adapter updates.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the actual discovery code in the MCP Server or CLI tools. NO rewriting of existing adapter templates. NO locking the protocol to a single toolchain. NO workflow state semantics modifications.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to implement actual adapter detection scripts.
Executing without an approved M4 contract.
